name: Dimensional Shackles
description:
You can take a {@action Utilize|XPHB} action to place these shackles on a creature that has the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. The shackles adjust to fit a creature of Small to Large size. The shackles prevent a creature bound by them from using any method of extradimensional movement, including teleportation or travel to a different plane of existence. They don't prevent the creature from passing through an interdimensional portal.
